assessment.note: He can articulate Principal impact abstractly but says this team's bar feels fuzzy, which is a strong role-clarity deficit.

new_queue.label: Team bar fuzzy
new_queue.name: What specifically feels fuzzy about this team's Principal bar?
new_queue.description: Pins down where his model of Principal expectations is unclear in concrete terms.

new_queue.label: What they're proud of
new_queue.name: What's something from the last quarter you're genuinely proud of — not what looks good, what actually was good?
new_queue.description: Separates real wins from performative ones; calibrates their sense of impact.

new_queue.label: Principal scope
new_queue.name: What does Principal scope mean to you on this team?
new_queue.description: Surfaces his current model of the role and whether it matches the team's expectations.

new_queue.label: Gap awareness
new_queue.name: Where do you think you've fallen short of where you want to be?
new_queue.description: Tests whether they can name their own gaps before the manager does.

new_queue.label: Expectation alignment
new_queue.name: When a piece of work starts, how do you decide what needs aligning early?
new_queue.description: Tests his habit of setting expectations before execution gets locked in.

new_queue.label: Question habit
new_queue.name: What stops you from asking more questions earlier?
new_queue.description: Gets at the behavior behind low question volume without assuming the cause.

new_queue.label: Next behavior
new_queue.name: What would you do differently on the next cross-team piece?
new_queue.description: Moves from diagnosis to one concrete behavior change in how he works across teams.
